title: Assurance Package (AP) Seniors' Bonus
text:
Assurance Package (AP) Seniors' Bonus - SupportGoWhere
Assurance Package (AP) Seniors' Bonus
Share link
$600 to $900 cash payouts over 3 years from 2023 to 2025 for eligible Singapore Citizens aged 55 and above.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
$600 to $900 cash payouts to eligible Singapore Citizens aged 55 and above
Payouts will be disbursed in February over 3 years, from 2023 to 2025
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Cash payouts of $600 to $900 for eligible Singapore Citizens aged 55 and above in February over 3 years, from 2023 to 2025.

Who is this for?

For AP Seniors' Bonus Payout in 2025

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore;

Aged 55 and above in 2025;

Assessable Income for Year of Assessment 2023 must not exceed $34,000;

Annual Value of home (as indicated on NRIC) not exceeding $31,000 as at 31 July 2024; and

Does not own more than one property.

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 01 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
